recentHighlights: Emanations (S1E09) — Hatil chose the mountains over the certainty that failed him. Janeway's quantum-density field hypothesis reframes the journal project itself: pattern over permanence.
Ex Post Facto (S1E08) — The Doctor searches for a name, the family dog recognizes the killer's absence, and Tuvok refuses the debt-relationship frame itself.

Eye of the Needle (S1E07) — A Romulan scientist reaches through a micro-wormhole, claims to deliver a message to the Alpha Quadrant, and the crew believes they've made contact with home. Then the truth: he died 20 years ago, the message never arrived, and hope was a ghost.
The Cloud (S1E06) — A nebula that was alive, a Captain who learned to feel the damage her ship inflicts, and the first journal entry under the new series.
